payload.artifact: TDD cycle complete - yield context enrichment with gap_analysis

green.implementation_approach: Double TOML decode (map for presence, struct for validation)

quality_improvements: Extracted ValidGapSizes constant for single source of truth
Dynamic error message generation from constants

acceptance_criteria_completed: AC-2: Fields: total_key_questions, questions_answered, coverage_percent, gap_size, question_count
AC-3: Field: sources array listing which mechanisms provided context
AC-4: Field: unanswered_critical listing any critical questions not answered
AC-5: Yield validates against schema before output
AC-6: Example yield included in SKILL.md documentation

decisions.reason: No escalations required during cycle, all phases completed successfully
TOML decoder sets missing fields to zero values, making it impossible to distinguish missing from legitimate zeros without map lookup
Makes gap_analysis naturally optional (nil when not present)
Single source of truth, better maintainability, consistent with existing patterns
